tasks.label: Run Django in Chrome
args: $url = "http://192.168.1.6:8000"; $chrome = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles "Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe"; if (-not (Test-Path $chrome)) { $chrome = Join-Path ${env:ProgramFiles(x86)} "Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe" }; if (Test-Path $chrome) { Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList $url } else { Write-Host "Chrome not found in Program Files, opening default browser instead."; Start-Process $url }; c:/Users/alber/OneDrive/Desktop/IPT/dj-env/Scripts/python.exe manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
